name: rune
description: Multi-agent engineering orchestration for Claude Code. Plan, work, review, inspect, test, and audit with Agent Teams. Includes 152 agent definitions across agents/ (109 core) and registry/ (43 extended) + 1 CLI-backed — max 8 concurrent runtime agents via Agent Teams. 16 commands, 69 skills. Self-audit runtime analysis of arc artifacts (hallucination detection, agent effectiveness, convergence analysis, metrics store) via 3 new meta-QA agents. Feature sediment detection with sediment-detector agent (SDMT-prefix) and validate-plugin-wiring.sh pre-commit script. UX Design Intelligence with 4 conditional UX review agents (heuristic, flow, interaction, cognitive) + ux-pattern-analyzer utility + ux-design-process skill (greenfield/brownfield methodology). Arc Phase 5.3 UX Verification integration. Curated elicitation methods for structured reasoning. Stack-aware intelligence with 12 language/framework/pattern specialist prompt templates (loaded on-demand). Figma design sync with VSM-based fidelity scoring. Inscription Sharding for parallel large-diff review. Multi-language quality guidance (Python, TypeScript, Rust, PHP, Axum). Talisman configuration mastery with stack-aware scaffolding. Session self-learning with CLI correction and review recurrence detection. Standalone browser E2E testing with human gate handling and interactive failure recovery. UntitledUI official MCP integration with builder-protocol metadata. Team Management SDK for centralized agent team orchestration. Arc phase-loop state file integrity subsystem with unconditional code-enforced writes, PostToolUse auto-recovery, and integrity log (canary retired in v2.56.0). Forge phase synchronous-completion guard (FORGE-SYNC-001, v2.60.1) prevents late-arriving teammate messages from stalling the arc Stop hook phase loop. v2.61.0 removes the Monitor tool integration (v2.57.0-v2.57.2) — bot-review-wait streaming, plugin monitors, and host-capability probe — after v2.57.2 regression exposed stop-hook stall risk; polling fallback paths are now the sole implementation. QA verdict schema tolerance (QA-VRD-001, v2.57.1) preserved. v2.63.0 resolves audit 20260420-112502 P1/P2 findings: symlink traversal rejection in untrusted-Ash path validators (SEC-AUDIT-004), adaptive SIGTERM→SIGKILL grace period (RUIN-002), diagnostic-write symlink guard (RUIN-003), N+1 jq/shasum batch elimination in statusline/context-monitor/talisman-resolve (EMBER-001/002/003). v2.64.0 hardens the arc Stop hook: 3-layer phase-skip defense (team liveness + artifact sentinel + freshness guard), Phase 2 AC-11/13/14/17 fixes, StopFailure API-error logging with best-effort checkpoint snapshot, and terminal-checkpoint guard that stops post-arc prompt re-injection loops.
